---
title: "Statistical tests"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/tests.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/tests.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/tests.pdf){download="tests.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/tests-task.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [ggsignif documentation](https://const-ae.github.io/ggsignif/){target="_blank"}: The official documentation for the ggsignif package to annotate plots with significance levels.
